- Proposed target: v0.1.0 (bump: minor)

## Gate checks
| Check | Result | Detail |
|---|---|---|
| CI / tests (HEAD) | PASS | CI workflow succeeded, CodeQL succeeded; local tests all green (5/5 packages) |

| README / doc currency | PASS | All 6 new commands (traffic, DSL, calls, dial, hangup, log) documented in README — fixed 2026-06-30 |

| Coverage regression | PASS | n/a — no prior baseline (first release), cannot regress |

| Assets preview | PASS | GoReleaser configured: linux/darwin/windows × amd64/arm64, Homebrew tap, checksums — first release so no prior assets to validate |
| Security | PASS | 2 CodeQL alerts dismissed (false positive: SSH InsecureIgnoreHostKey in diagnose; protocol-mandated: MD5 in HTTP Digest Auth); 0 Dependabot; 0 secret-scanning |

## Findings
- [x] **[WARN][Docs] New commands missing from README** — RESOLVED
  - **Status quo:** `cmd/symfritz/traffic.go`, `cmd/symfritz/dsl.go`, `cmd/symfritz/phone.go` (calls/dial/hangup), `cmd/symfritz/log.go` are registered in `main.go:66-71` but not documented in README.md Usage section.
  - **Likely cause:** Commands added in recent PRs (#35, #43) without README update.
  - **Proposed solution:** Add Usage entries for `symfritz traffic`, `symfritz dsl`, `symfritz calls`, `symfritz dial`, `symfritz hangup`, `symfritz log` to README.md.
  - **Handoff:** `/02-gh-plan --from-review` or manual update before release.

- [ ] **[WARN][Coverage] Overall coverage 48.9% — no hard gate**
  - **Status quo:** cmd/symfritz at 12.8% (CLI commands largely untested end-to-end); internal/fritz at 75.9%; internal/mcp at 80.9%; internal/secret at 86.2%; internal/config at 100%.
  - **Likely cause:** CLI commands require live FRITZ!Box or complex mocking; recent additions (traffic, DSL, phone, log) have limited test coverage.
  - **Proposed solution:** Not a blocker for v0.1.0 (no hard gate configured). Consider adding `fail_under` to CI and coverage tests for new commands in follow-up.
  - **Handoff:** `/test-coverage` → `/02-gh-plan --from-coverage` → `/03-gh-go`
